message: Node started: Strategic Roadmap: 2D Constrained Rectangle Packing. 1. Core Algorithmic Challenges: Constraint Satisfaction (point containment and no overlap), Objective Optimization (minimize area discrepancy and maximize placement), Spatial Conflict (fragmented free space), Geometric Complexity (10,000 x 10,000 grid). 2. Recommended Approach: Iterative Greedy with Local Search/Refinement. Use a Greedy Construction + Local Improvement framework such as GRASP or Simulated Annealing. Use a Quadtree or 2D Segment Tree for spatial partitioning. 3. Step-by-Step Implementation Flow: Step 1: Pre-processing & Sorting (sort by Target Area descending). Step 2: Initial Greedy Construction (grow rectangles around points using growth direction strategy). Step 3: Local Search / Iterative Refinement (shifting, resizing, and Simulated Annealing moves). 4. Key Edge Cases & Mathematical Properties: Boundary Constraints, Point Containment, Area Discrepancy, and Density Bottlenecks.
